creator: ache@nagual.pp.ru
text:
On Tue, 20 Jan 1998, Igor Vinokurov wrote:

> re,
> 
> > > fetch (in make fetch stage) do not use passive ftp mode
> > > even I set FTP_PASSIVE_MODE=YES in /etc/make.conf
> > 
> > It is environment variable, not 'make' variable
> 
> I understand and use :)
> 
> But look at comment in /etc/make.conf:
> 
> #
> # If you are running behind a firewall, uncomment the following to leave a
> # hint for various make-spawned utilities that they should use passive FTP.
> #
> FTP_PASSIVE_MODE=       YES

Either wrong comment in make.conf or lack of bsd.port.mk support,
ask Satoshi, our portsmaster.

-- 
Andrey A. Chernov
<ache@nietzsche.net>
http://www.nagual.pp.ru/~ache/
